summary: This TDD decomposes the approved Graphic Autonumber SDD into atomic, implementable engineering tasks on Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps canvas + Power Automate + Dataverse + SharePoint + Outlook + Teams). Implementation proceeds in four phases: (1) tenant/environment + Dataverse schema + identity, (2) Power Automate flows (Autonumber + Status Change) and Outlook templates, (3) Power Apps canvas screens (Landing, Create Tracker, Open Tracker, View Tracker, New Item, Edit Item) wired to Dataverse and the flows, and (4) Teams tab packaging, RBAC hardening, observability and UAT. Each task traces to a named SDD component and (for UI work) an SDD screen id, and uses the autonumber format <OppID>.<YY>.<NNNN> defined by BT in Q1.
buildSequence: Phase 1 — Foundation: Power Platform environment, Dataverse solution & tables (GraphicTracker, GraphicRequest, OrderSequence), security roles, Entra ID/Teams identity wiring.

Phase 2 — Workflow Backbone: AutonumberFlow (atomic OrderSequence increment + control-number stamp), StatusChangeFlow (Updates Needed / Completed routing), Outlook email templates and read-only enforcement on GraphicControlNumber.

Phase 3 — Canvas App: Build and wire Landing, Create Tracker, Open Existing Tracker, View Tracker (auto-refresh, group/sort), New Item (triggers AutonumberFlow), and Edit Item (read-only control number, status transitions, Email-status-updates-to-Author toggle).

Phase 4 — Packaging, RBAC, Observability & UAT: Teams tab manifest, Team/Channel membership filter, Dataverse field-level audit on Status/GraphicControlNumber, flow run-history monitoring, smoke + UAT across Growth Markets/EMEA/Americas.

modules.name: DataverseGraphicStore
modules.purpose: Dataverse solution that owns the GraphicTracker, GraphicRequest and OrderSequence tables, including keys, indexes, security roles and field-level audit configuration.

interfaces.name: gt_graphictracker
interfaces.signature: Table gt_graphictracker { gt_trackerid: uniqueidentifier PK, gt_opportunityid: string(6) UNIQUE, gt_dealname: string(200), gt_teamschannellink: string(500), gt_teamid: string(64), gt_channelid: string(64), createdby: lookup(systemuser), createdon: datetime }
interfaces.description: One row per deal-scoped tracker. OpportunityId is unique and immutable post-save.

interfaces.name: gt_graphicrequest
interfaces.signature: Table gt_graphicrequest { gt_requestid: uniqueidentifier PK, gt_trackerid: lookup(gt_graphictracker), gt_graphiccontrolnumber: string(20) UNIQUE, gt_title: string(200), gt_status: optionset{New=1,InProgress=2,UpdatesNeeded=3,Completed=4}, gt_graphicstype: optionset{Basic=1,Medium=2,Complex=3}, gt_instructions: memo, gt_section: string(20), gt_authorsmecontact: string(100), gt_submittedby: lookup(systemuser), gt_graphicdesigner: lookup(systemuser), gt_sourcefilecontrolnumber: string(20), gt_emailstatusupdatestoauthor: boolean default true, createdon, modifiedon, modifiedby }
interfaces.description: Source of truth for graphic line items; GraphicControlNumber is read-only after first write.

interfaces.name: gt_ordersequence
interfaces.signature: Table gt_ordersequence { gt_sequencekey: string(10) PK ALT-KEY (<OppId>.<YY>), gt_opportunityid: string(6), gt_year: string(2), gt_lastorder: int(0..9999) default 0, modifiedon: datetime }
interfaces.description: Atomic counter row used by AutonumberFlow with ETag concurrency.

modules.name: AutonumberFlow
modules.purpose: Power Automate cloud flow that allocates the next 4-digit Order per (OppId, Year) and stamps GraphicControlNumber on the new GraphicRequest row; fires New-Graphics email.

interfaces.name: flow_AutonumberOnGraphicRequestCreate
interfaces.signature: Trigger: Dataverse 'When a row is added' on gt_graphicrequest. Inputs: new row (gt_requestid, gt_trackerid). Outputs: updates gt_graphiccontrolnumber on the same row + sends 'New Graphics' email.
interfaces.description: Atomic get-or-create + increment of gt_ordersequence using If-Match ETag with up to 5 jittered retries on HTTP 412.

modules.name: StatusChangeFlow
modules.purpose: Power Automate flow that routes 'Updates Needed' emails to the Designer and 'Completed' emails to the Submitter/Author when gt_status transitions.

interfaces.name: flow_StatusChangeOnGraphicRequestUpdate
interfaces.signature: Trigger: Dataverse 'When a row is modified' on gt_graphicrequest, filter on gt_status change. Inputs: prior + new status. Outputs: Outlook 'Send an email (V2)' calls per template.
interfaces.description: Branches on new status; respects gt_emailstatusupdatestoauthor toggle for Author copies.

modules.name: NotificationService
modules.purpose: Outlook (Exchange Online) connector wrapper that owns the three HTML email templates from the PDD.

interfaces.name: template_NewGraphics
interfaces.description: Subject 'New Graphics for Proposal - [Opportunity Name]', PDD-specified table body.

interfaces.name: template_Completed
interfaces.description: Subject 'Graphics Completed for Proposal - [Opportunity Name]'; CC Author/SME only when toggle is ON.

modules.name: GraphicTrackerCanvasApp
modules.purpose: Power Apps canvas application providing all six screens, embedded as a Teams channel tab.

interfaces.name: scr_Landing
interfaces.signature: Landing screen — Hello banner + 3 navigation buttons + SharePoint link
interfaces.description: Entry point in the Teams tab.

interfaces.name: scr_CreateTracker
interfaces.signature: Create Tracker form — OppId, DealName, Team, Channel, derived link

interfaces.name: scr_OpenTracker
interfaces.description: Reads gt_graphictracker filtered by user's Team memberships.

interfaces.name: scr_ViewTracker
interfaces.signature: View Tracker — gallery of gt_graphicrequest rows + group/sort + auto-refresh
interfaces.description: List view for the active tracker.

interfaces.name: scr_NewItem
interfaces.description: Submits a new gt_graphicrequest row; AutonumberFlow stamps the control number.

interfaces.name: scr_EditItem
interfaces.description: Updates fields and status; control number is read-only.

modules.name: TeamsMembershipResolver
modules.purpose: Microsoft Graph / Teams connector wrapper that returns the Teams/Channels the current user is a member of, used to filter dropdowns and tracker visibility.

interfaces.name: GetMyChannels
interfaces.description: Wraps GET /teams/{id}/channels filtered to channels the user can read.

modules.name: IdentityProvider
modules.purpose: Entra ID SSO wrapper used to supply the signed-in user object across screens and flows.

modules.name: SharePointAssetStore
modules.purpose: SharePoint Online document libraries holding completed graphic files, templates and production materials, referenced from the canvas app for the naming-convention guide.

interfaces.name: DealAssetLibrary
interfaces.description: Returns the SharePoint folder URL surfaced via the Landing screen link.

modules.name: TeamsTabPackaging
modules.purpose: Teams app manifest and Power Apps Teams tab embedding so the canvas app appears as a channel tab.

interfaces.name: manifest.json
interfaces.signature: Teams app manifest v1.16 with staticTabs + configurableTabs entry for the Power Apps tab
interfaces.description: Used by deal channels to add the Graphic Tracker tab.

tasks.title: Provision Power Platform environments and managed solution
tasks.description: Create DEV, UAT and PROD Power Platform environments in the Accenture tenant, enable Dataverse on each, and create a managed solution 'GraphicAutonumber' with publisher prefix 'gt'. Configure environment routing for the AutonumberFlow and StatusChangeFlow connectors.
acceptanceCriteria: Three environments (DEV/UAT/PROD) exist with Dataverse provisioned.
Managed solution 'GraphicAutonumber' with publisher prefix 'gt' is created in DEV and exportable to UAT/PROD.
Service principal / connection references for Dataverse, Outlook, Teams, and SharePoint connectors are configured at the environment level.
tasks.pseudocode:
# Power Platform CLI
pac auth create --name accDev --tenant <accenture-tenant-id>
pac admin create --name 'GraphicAutonumber-DEV' --region 'unitedstates' --type Production
pac admin create --name 'GraphicAutonumber-UAT' --region 'unitedstates' --type Production
pac admin create --name 'GraphicAutonumber-PROD' --region 'unitedstates' --type Production
pac solution init --publisher-name 'AcnGraphics' --publisher-prefix 'gt'
pac solution add-reference --path .
pac solution pack --zipfile GraphicAutonumber.zip --packagetype Managed

tasks.title: Create Dataverse table gt_graphictracker with keys and security
tasks.description: Model the GraphicTracker entity per SDD.dataModel. Add the unique alternate key on gt_opportunityid and an index on (gt_teamid, gt_channelid). Enable owner-based security with a row-level filter that restricts read/write to users who own or share the row.
acceptanceCriteria: Table gt_graphictracker exists with all SDD fields and correct data types.
Alternate key Unique(gt_opportunityid) is enforced — attempting a second insert with the same OppId returns 412/409.
Index on (gt_teamid, gt_channelid) exists.
Security role 'GraphicTrackerUser' grants Create/Read/Write/Append on the table at the User level.
tasks.pseudocode:
// Customizations.xml (Dataverse table definition — abbreviated)
<Entity Name="gt_graphictracker" OwnershipType="UserOwned">
  <attribute name="gt_trackerid" type="uniqueidentifier" PK="true"/>
  <attribute name="gt_opportunityid" type="nvarchar" length="6" required="SystemRequired"/>
  <attribute name="gt_dealname" type="nvarchar" length="200" required="SystemRequired"/>
  <attribute name="gt_teamschannellink" type="nvarchar" length="500"/>
  <attribute name="gt_teamid" type="nvarchar" length="64"/>
  <attribute name="gt_channelid" type="nvarchar" length="64"/>
  <AlternateKey name="AK_OpportunityId" attributes="gt_opportunityid"/>
  <Index name="IX_TeamChannel" attributes="gt_teamid,gt_channelid"/>
</Entity>

tasks.title: Create Dataverse table gt_graphicrequest with audit and read-only control-number rule
tasks.description: Model GraphicRequest per SDD with the gt_status and gt_graphicstype option sets. Mark gt_graphiccontrolnumber as 'unique alternate key' and add a Dataverse business rule + plugin step to reject any UPDATE that changes gt_graphiccontrolnumber once it is non-null (BT Q2). Enable field-level audit on gt_status and gt_graphiccontrolnumber.
acceptanceCriteria: All fields from SDD.GraphicRequest are present with correct types and option-set values (New=1, InProgress=2, UpdatesNeeded=3, Completed=4).
gt_graphiccontrolnumber is unique; second insert with the same value returns an alternate-key violation.
Direct API update to gt_graphiccontrolnumber on a row where it is already populated returns an InvalidOperationException raised by the plugin.
Field audit history on gt_status and gt_graphiccontrolnumber is visible in 'Auditing → Audit History'.

tasks.title: Create Dataverse table gt_ordersequence with composite alternate key
tasks.description: Model the OrderSequence counter table. Add an alternate key on gt_sequencekey so AutonumberFlow can upsert by key. Seed no rows — the flow creates them on first use per (OppId, Year).
acceptanceCriteria: Table gt_ordersequence exists with fields gt_sequencekey (string 10), gt_opportunityid (string 6), gt_year (string 2), gt_lastorder (int default 0), modifiedon.
Unique alternate key AK_SequenceKey on gt_sequencekey is enforced.
gt_lastorder has min=0, max=9999.
tasks.pseudocode:
<Entity Name="gt_ordersequence" OwnershipType="OrganizationOwned">
  <attribute name="gt_sequencekey" type="nvarchar" length="10" required="SystemRequired"/>
  <attribute name="gt_opportunityid" type="nvarchar" length="6" required="SystemRequired"/>
  <attribute name="gt_year" type="nvarchar" length="2" required="SystemRequired"/>
  <attribute name="gt_lastorder" type="int" minValue="0" maxValue="9999" defaultValue="0"/>
  <AlternateKey name="AK_SequenceKey" attributes="gt_sequencekey"/>
</Entity>

tasks.title: Define security roles, sharing, and Team-membership row filter
tasks.description: Create the 'GraphicTrackerUser' Dataverse security role granting User-level CRUD on gt_graphictracker / gt_graphicrequest and Read on gt_ordersequence (only flows can write). Apply hierarchical sharing rule: when a tracker is created the row is auto-shared with members of the linked AAD group (TeamId). Document the role mapping for the 262 production FTEs and 300-user concurrency cap from BT Q4.
acceptanceCriteria: Role 'GraphicTrackerUser' is exportable with the managed solution.
A user who is NOT in the AAD group of a tracker's TeamId cannot read that tracker or its requests via SDK or Power App.
Role only allows Read on gt_ordersequence; insert/update is denied to all users (only the flow connection has those privileges).

tasks.title: Build AutonumberFlow — atomic OrderSequence increment and control-number stamp
tasks.description: Create the Power Automate cloud flow that triggers on gt_graphicrequest row create. It resolves the parent gt_graphictracker to read gt_opportunityid, computes sequenceKey = OppId + '.' + last-two-digits(year(utcNow)), upserts the gt_ordersequence row, increments gt_lastorder atomically using If-Match ETag with up to 5 retries (exponential jitter), formats <OppId>.<YY>.<NNNN>, and patches gt_graphiccontrolnumber on the originating row. On final failure logs to flow run history and surfaces a 'Control number pending' placeholder on the row (BT Q5 platform-outage mitigation).
acceptanceCriteria: Trigger fires within 5s of a row create on gt_graphicrequest in DEV environment.
Two concurrent inserts for the same OppId+Year produce two distinct, consecutive control numbers (e.g., .0001 and .0002) — verified by parallel-load script.
Forced 412 from Dataverse on the OrderSequence update is retried up to 5x with jittered backoff; on success the final value is correct.
Generated value matches regex ^\d{6}\.\d{2}\.\d{4}$.
After successful stamp, the New-Graphics email is dispatched (handed off to task 8).
tasks.pseudocode:
// Power Automate — AutonumberFlow
Trigger: 'When a row is added' (Dataverse) — Table: gt_graphicrequest

Init variables:
  varOppId   = triggerOutputs()?['body/_gt_trackerid_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']
  // Lookup tracker to get OppId
  Tracker = Get a row by ID (gt_graphictracker, triggerOutputs()?['body/_gt_trackerid_value'])
  varOppId = Tracker['gt_opportunityid']
  varYY    = substring(string(utcNow('yy')), 0, 2)
  varKey   = concat(varOppId, '.', varYY)
  varRetry = 0
  varStamped = false

Do Until (varStamped or varRetry >= 5):
  Get sequence row (alternate key gt_sequencekey eq varKey)
    if Not Found:
      Add new row gt_ordersequence { gt_sequencekey: varKey, gt_opportunityid: varOppId, gt_year: varYY, gt_lastorder: 0 }
  Capture etag = body['@odata.etag']
  varNext = add(int(seqRow['gt_lastorder']), 1)
  Update row gt_ordersequence id=seqRow.id with body { gt_lastorder: varNext } HEADERS { 'If-Match': etag }
  If success (200/204):
    varControlNumber = concat(varOppId, '.', varYY, '.', formatNumber(varNext, '0000'))
    Update row gt_graphicrequest id=trigger.gt_requestid with { gt_graphiccontrolnumber: varControlNumber }
    Set varStamped = true
  Else if 412 Precondition Failed:
    Increment varRetry
    Delay rand(200ms .. 1000ms * pow(2, varRetry))
  Else: Terminate (Failed)

If not varStamped:
  Update row gt_graphicrequest with { gt_graphiccontrolnumber: 'PENDING' } and log to run history.

tasks.title: Build StatusChangeFlow — branch on gt_status transitions
tasks.description: Power Automate flow triggered on gt_graphicrequest modify, filtered to runs where gt_status changes. Branch: 'Updates Needed' → call NotificationService.UpdatesNeeded template to Graphic Designer; 'Completed' → Completed template to Submitter, CC Author/SME when gt_emailstatusupdatestoauthor = true; other transitions → no email.
acceptanceCriteria: Trigger filter 'gt_status' is set so the flow only runs when status actually changes.
Switch on gt_status value sends the correct PDD template per state.
When gt_emailstatusupdatestoauthor = false, no Author/SME copy is sent on Completed.
Flow run history shows 'Succeeded' for all happy-path UAT scenarios.
tasks.pseudocode:
Trigger: 'When a row is modified' (Dataverse) — Table: gt_graphicrequest
  Trigger condition: @not(equals(triggerOutputs()?['body/gt_status@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue'], triggerOutputs()?['body/_gt_previousstatus_value@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue']))
  // Use ChangeTrackingHeader 'If-None-Match' or 'ms-dynamics-changedfields' to scope to gt_status

Switch on triggerBody()?['gt_status']:
  case 3 /* Updates Needed */:
     Compose updatesBody = NotificationService.renderUpdatesNeededEmail(triggerBody())
     Send an email (V2) To: designer.email Subject: updatesBody.subject Body: updatesBody.html IsHtml: true
  case 4 /* Completed */:
     Compose completedBody = NotificationService.renderCompletedEmail(triggerBody())
     Send an email (V2) To: submitter.email
        Cc: if(equals(triggerBody()?['gt_emailstatusupdatestoauthor'], true), authorEmail, null)
        Subject: completedBody.subject Body: completedBody.html IsHtml: true
  default: terminate(Succeeded)

tasks.title: Implement Outlook email templates (New Graphics, Updates Needed, Completed)
tasks.description: Author the three PDD email templates as Compose actions feeding 'Send an email (V2)'. Subjects: 'New Graphics for Proposal - [Opportunity Name]', 'Updates Needed for Graphics - [Opportunity Name]', 'Graphics Completed for Proposal - [Opportunity Name]'. Bodies render the PDD-specified HTML tables with the columns listed in SDD.notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: All three templates render the exact PDD column set; emails display correctly in Outlook desktop and OWA.
Subject substitutes [Opportunity Name] from the parent gt_graphictracker.gt_dealname.
Completed template includes Source File Control Number when present; renders '-' when null.
tasks.pseudocode:
// Power Automate expression — Completed email body (HTML) concat( '

Dear ', triggerBody()?['gt_submittedby_formattedvalue'], ',

', '

We are pleased to inform you that the graphics for your proposal have been completed.

', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '
IDTitleGraphic Control NumberStatusTypeInstructionsSource File Ctrl #SectionAuthor/SMESubmitted ByDesignerCreatedModifiedModified By
', string(triggerBody()?['gt_rownumber']), '', triggerBody()?['gt_title'], '', triggerBody()?['gt_graphiccontrolnumber'], 'Completed', triggerBody()?['gt_graphicstype@OData.Community.Display.V1.FormattedValue'], '', coalesce(triggerBody()?['gt_instructions'], ''), '', coalesce(triggerBody()?['gt_sourcefilecontrolnumber'], '-'), '', coalesce(triggerBody()?['gt_section'], ''), '', coalesce(triggerBody()?['gt_authorsmecontact'], ''), '', triggerBody()?['gt_submittedby_formattedvalue'], '', triggerBody()?['gt_graphicdesigner_formattedvalue'], '', triggerBody()?['createdon'], '', triggerBody()?['modifiedon'], '', triggerBody()?['modifiedby_formattedvalue'], '
', '

Note: This is an automatically generated email, please do not reply.

' )

tasks.title: Bootstrap Power Apps canvas app shell and Dataverse connections
tasks.description: Create the GraphicTracker canvas app in DEV. Add data sources: Dataverse (gt_graphictracker, gt_graphicrequest), Office365Users, Microsoft Teams. Apply Accenture theme variables (primary purple #A100FF accent, neutral greys). Define App.OnStart to initialise gblUser and gblTheme.
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas app opens in Studio with all three data sources connected without errors.
App.OnStart loads gblUser within 1s on a warm session.
App passes the Power Apps checker with zero high-severity issues.

tasks.title: Build scr_Landing screen with personalised greeting and 3 navigation buttons
tasks.description: Implement the Landing screen per SDD wireframe. Header shows 'Hello <FullName>' from gblUser. Three buttons: 'Create a New Graphic Tracker' → scr_CreateTracker; 'Add/Update requests in existing Graphics Tracker' → scr_ViewTracker for the current channel; 'Open Existing Graphic Tracker' → scr_OpenTracker. Add SharePoint folder/naming-convention hyperlink.
acceptanceCriteria: lblHello displays 'Hello <gblUser.displayName>' on screen load.
Each of the three buttons navigates to the correct screen with no console errors.
lnkSharePoint opens the configured deal library URL in a new tab via Launch().

tasks.title: Build scr_CreateTracker form with cascading Team/Channel dropdowns
tasks.description: Implement the Create Tracker screen per SDD wireframe. Controls: txtOppId (6-digit numeric, required), txtDealName (required), ddTeam (uses TeamsMembershipResolver.GetMyTeams), ddChannel (cascades from selected team), txtChannelLink (read-only, derived from channel.webUrl), btnCreate, btnCancel. On Create, patch gt_graphictracker.
acceptanceCriteria: txtOppId rejects non-numeric input and values not exactly 6 digits.
Creating a second tracker with the same OppId surfaces an inline error 'Opportunity ID already exists' (caught from the Dataverse alt-key violation).
ddTeam only lists Teams returned by GetMyTeams; ddChannel only lists channels for the selected team that the user can read.
txtChannelLink auto-populates from ddChannel.Selected.webUrl and is read-only.
On successful Patch, app navigates to scr_ViewTracker for the new tracker.

tasks.title: Build scr_OpenTracker with search, sort and member-filtered list
tasks.description: Implement Open Existing Tracker per SDD wireframe. Gallery bound to gt_graphictrackers filtered by gt_teamid IN GetMyTeamIds(). Search box filters on OppId or DealName; sort dropdown drives Created Date / Deal Name / Opportunity ID order. Row click sets gblActiveTracker and navigates to scr_ViewTracker.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery never shows a tracker whose gt_teamid is not in the current user's Teams membership list.
Search updates the gallery within 500ms of keystroke pause.
Sort dropdown changes the gallery order without losing scroll position.
Row click sets gblActiveTracker and navigates to scr_ViewTracker.
tasks.pseudocode:
// galTrackers.Items
SortByColumns(
  Filter(gt_graphictrackers,
         gt_teamid in gblMyTeamIds &&
         (IsBlank(txtSearch.Text) ||
          StartsWith(gt_opportunityid, txtSearch.Text) ||
          gt_dealname in txtSearch.Text)),
  Switch(ddSort.Selected.Value,
         "Created Date", "createdon",
         "Deal Name",    "gt_dealname",
         "Opportunity ID", "gt_opportunityid"),
  If(ddSort.Selected.Value="Created Date", Descending, Ascending)
)

// galTrackers.OnSelect (per row)
Set(gblActiveTracker, ThisItem);
Navigate(scr_ViewTracker, ScreenTransition.None)

tasks.title: Build scr_ViewTracker with auto-refresh, group-by and sort
tasks.description: Implement the View Tracker screen per SDD wireframe. Header shows '<DealName> — Opp <OppId>'. Gallery bound to gt_graphicrequests filtered by gt_trackerid = gblActiveTracker. Columns: Graphic Control Number (read-only), Title, Status (badge), Type, Designer. Group-by: Status | Designer | Type. Sort-by: Created | Modified | Title | Status. Add 30-second timer that re-runs the query.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery shows only requests for gblActiveTracker.
Timer fires every 30,000ms and refreshes the data source; the refresh does not lose the user's current group/sort selection.
Status badge styles: New = neutral grey, In Progress = gold, Updates Needed = accent rust, Completed = positive green.
+ New Item button navigates to scr_NewItem with gblActiveTracker in context.

tasks.title: Build TeamsMembershipResolver wrapper for canvas app
tasks.description: Centralise calls to the Microsoft Teams connector behind two named formulas on the App: gblMyTeamIds and a helper colMyChannels. Use Office365Groups / MicrosoftTeams.GetAllTeams() filtered to the current user's joinedTeams. Cache results in collections on App.OnStart so screens render without re-calling Graph.
acceptanceCriteria: App.OnStart populates colMyTeams within 2s on a warm session of 50 Teams.
gblMyTeamIds is an array of team IDs and is referenced by scr_CreateTracker, scr_OpenTracker and scr_ViewTracker.
A user not a member of a Team cannot see that Team in the dropdown or its trackers in scr_OpenTracker.

tasks.title: Build scr_NewItem form, trigger AutonumberFlow, and poll for stamp
tasks.description: Implement the New Graphic Request screen per SDD wireframe. Controls: lblControlNumber (read-only — shows 'Auto-generated on save'), txtTitle (required), ddType (Basic/Medium/Complex, required), txtaInstructions, txtSection, txtAuthorSme, lblSubmittedBy (gblUser.displayName), peopleDesigner (people-picker restricted to channel members), tglEmailAuthor (default ON), btnSave, btnCancel. On Save, Patch gt_graphicrequest with Status=New; rely on AutonumberFlow (server-side row-create trigger) to stamp the number; poll the row up to 30s for gt_graphiccontrolnumber, otherwise show 'Control number pending' banner (BT Q5 mitigation).
acceptanceCriteria: btnSave is disabled when txtTitle or ddType is empty.
lblSubmittedBy is read-only and bound to gblUser.displayName.
On Save, a gt_graphicrequest row is created with gt_status = New and gt_emailstatusupdatestoauthor = tglEmailAuthor.Value.
Within 30s the gallery row shows the stamped control number matching ^\d{6}\.\d{2}\.\d{4}$.
If the polling timer expires with control number still null, the row banner 'Control number pending' is visible.

tasks.title: Build scr_EditItem form with locked control number and Source-File regex validation
tasks.description: Implement the Edit Graphic Request screen per SDD wireframe. Controls: lblControlNumber (read-only, click-to-copy via Copy() per BT Q2), ddStatus (New/In Progress/Updates Needed/Completed), txtSourceFileCtrl (validated with regex ^\d{6}\.\d{2}\.\d{4}$ when provided), tglEmailAuthor, plus the editable Title/Type/Instructions/Section/Author/Designer fields, btnSave/Cancel. On Save, Patch the row; StatusChangeFlow auto-fires from Dataverse.
acceptanceCriteria: lblControlNumber DisplayMode = View; clicking it copies the value to the clipboard and shows a toast (BT Q2).
txtSourceFileCtrl shows an inline error if not blank and not matching the autonumber regex.
ddStatus restricted to 4 values; changing to Updates Needed or Completed and saving causes StatusChangeFlow to dispatch the correct email within 30s (verified by Run History).
Submitted By is shown but locked.

tasks.title: Embed Power App as Teams tab — manifest and channel installation guide
tasks.description: Generate the Teams app package via Power Apps Studio → 'Add to Teams', publish to the Teams catalog as an Accenture line-of-business app, and document the deal-team install steps (Add a tab → Graphic Tracker → done). Configure both static and configurable tab entries so a deal team can pin the app per channel.
acceptanceCriteria: Teams app manifest passes the Teams App validator with zero errors.
Tab can be added to a deal channel and renders the Landing screen within 3s.
The tab honours Teams light/dark theme switching.

tasks.title: Configure SharePoint asset library link and naming-convention page
tasks.description: Create the SharePoint Online site/library structure for completed graphics (per PDD section 6.4.1) and store its base URL in a Dataverse environment variable gt_SharePointGuideUrl referenced by scr_Landing.lnkSharePoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Environment variable gt_SharePointGuideUrl exists and resolves to a working SharePoint URL.
Clicking the Landing link opens that URL in a new tab.
Per-deal subfolders use the naming convention <OppID>_<DealName> documented on the guide page.

tasks.title: Add platform-outage banner and 'Control number pending' UX
tasks.description: Implement the BT Q5 fail-safe UX: if a row exists with gt_graphiccontrolnumber blank or 'PENDING' for more than 60s, surface a yellow banner 'Control number pending — will appear automatically' on scr_ViewTracker and scr_EditItem. Banner clears as soon as the value is stamped.
acceptanceCriteria: Forcing AutonumberFlow off in DEV results in the banner appearing on the row within 60s of save.
Re-enabling the flow and waiting for stamp clears the banner automatically on the next 30s refresh.

tasks.title: Enable Dataverse field-level audit and OrderSequence high-water alert
tasks.description: Turn on table-level audit on gt_graphicrequest with field-level audit on gt_status and gt_graphiccontrolnumber only (BT Q6 declined custom logging; this is the zero-build trail per SDD residual-risk mitigation). Add a scheduled Power Automate alert that emails the BT lead when any gt_ordersequence.gt_lastorder >= 9000 (PDD assumption headroom).
acceptanceCriteria: Audit History on a sample gt_graphicrequest row shows entries for status changes and the initial control-number stamp.
Scheduled flow 'flow_OrderSequenceHighWater' runs daily and sends an email when any sequence row is >= 9000.
tasks.pseudocode:
// flow_OrderSequenceHighWater
Trigger: Recurrence (Daily 06:00 UTC)
List rows from gt_ordersequence: $filter=gt_lastorder ge 9000
If length(body('List_rows').value) > 0:
   Send an email (V2)
      To: btlead@accenture.com
      Subject: '[Graphic Tracker] OrderSequence high-water reached'
      Body: Compose table of OppId / Year / LastOrder

tasks.title: Run end-to-end smoke and UAT pack
tasks.description: Execute a scripted smoke test covering happy path (create tracker → new item → autonumber → status transitions → completion email) plus the BT-relevant edge cases (concurrent submissions, duplicate OppId, missing OppId, platform-outage simulation). Coordinate UAT with 8-10 representative users from Growth Markets, EMEA and Americas.
acceptanceCriteria: Smoke pack: 100% of scenarios pass in UAT environment.
Concurrent-load script (10 parallel POSTs per OppId+Year): all rows receive distinct, consecutive control numbers.
All three email templates render correctly in Outlook desktop and OWA for at least one UAT user per region.
Sign-off recorded by BT Lead (Deepa Ramanujam or Kamna Verma) with PDD-version 2.0 reference.
tasks.pseudocode:
// UAT script outline
1. Create tracker { OppId=900001, DealName='UAT Deal', Team='UAT Team', Channel='UAT Ch' }
2. Add Item { Title='Overview', Type=Medium, Designer=user1, EmailAuthor=ON } → expect control number 900001.<YY>.0001
3. Add second item in parallel from another user → expect 900001.<YY>.0002
4. Edit item to Status='Updates Needed' → expect Designer email
5. Edit item to Status='Completed' → expect Submitter email + Author CC
6. Attempt API patch of gt_graphiccontrolnumber → expect plugin rejection
7. Disable AutonumberFlow → add item → expect 'pending' banner within 60s
8. Re-enable flow → wait 30s → expect banner clears and number appears

sequenceDiagrams.name: Autonumber Concurrency — Two parallel inserts on same (OppId, Year)

dataMigrationOrBootstrap.task: No data migration required — this is a new build per BT Q3. Confirm Day-0 with zero rows in gt_graphictracker / gt_graphicrequest / gt_ordersequence.
dataMigrationOrBootstrap.approach: Smoke-check empty tables post-deploy; document that legacy Excel-tracked control numbers are NOT imported.

dataMigrationOrBootstrap.task: Seed environment variable gt_SharePointGuideUrl per environment (DEV/UAT/PROD).
dataMigrationOrBootstrap.approach: Set via solution import or via 'Power Platform admin → Environment variables'.

dataMigrationOrBootstrap.task: Bootstrap Teams app catalog entry in the Accenture tenant.
dataMigrationOrBootstrap.approach: Sideload the manifest in a pilot tenant, then publish via Teams Admin Centre after UAT sign-off.

testStrategy.unit: Use Power Apps Test Studio to author Test Suites per screen (scr_Landing, scr_CreateTracker, scr_OpenTracker, scr_ViewTracker, scr_NewItem, scr_EditItem) asserting control properties, OnSelect outcomes, and validation messages. For the Dataverse 'LockControlNumber' plugin use the PluginRegistration tool's Plugin Profiler with serialized contexts covering Create, Update-no-change, Update-with-change. For Power Automate, isolate the OrderSequence increment logic by running the flow against a DEV environment with a mocked Dataverse table populated with edge-case rows (LastOrder=0, 9998, 9999).
testStrategy.integration: End-to-end happy path: Teams tab → Power App → Patch gt_graphicrequest → AutonumberFlow → email → email in Outlook. Run with two distinct user identities in UAT (one Submitter, one Designer) to confirm RBAC. Use Power Automate Run History plus Dataverse audit log to verify each hop. Concurrency: a small PowerShell driver that submits 10 parallel POSTs to the Dataverse Web API for the same (OppId, Year) and asserts 10 distinct, consecutive control numbers.
testStrategy.uat: Recruit 8-10 representative users across the three operating windows (India / EMEA / North America) consistent with the 262-FTE production population. Provide a one-page UAT script that mirrors the happy-path + 3 edge cases. Sign-off requires: (a) all UAT scripts pass, (b) at least one Designer per region receives all three email types and confirms rendering, (c) BT Lead signs the UAT closure form against PDD v2.0.
edgeCases: Concurrent submissions for the same OppId+Year — autonumber must remain unique and consecutive (PDD pre-process rule + BT Q1).
Duplicate Opportunity ID at tracker creation — Dataverse alt-key violation surfaced as friendly error (SDD GraphicTracker.Unique(OpportunityId)).
User not a member of the Team/Channel — Team/Channel dropdowns are empty and trackers are invisible (BT Q5).
Attempt to PATCH gt_graphiccontrolnumber after generation — plugin rejects with InvalidPluginExecutionException (BT Q2).
Power Automate platform outage during create — row persists, banner 'Control number pending' shows, backfill on recovery (BT Q5, SDD risk 3).
gt_ordersequence.gt_lastorder reaches 9000 — high-water alert email sent to BT lead (PDD assumption ≤9000 per deal).
Status changes from In Progress → New (downward) — StatusChangeFlow correctly takes the no-email default branch.
Toggle 'Email status updates to Author' = OFF on Completed transition — Submitter still receives email, Author/SME does not (SDD notifications.userOptOut).
Source File Control Number entered in wrong format — inline validation blocks Save.

pddVisualReferences.whatItShows: Sample Graphic Control Number 000007.26.0001 illustrating the OppID.YY.Order naming convention from PDD section 6.4.1 (also reaffirmed in BT Q1).
pddVisualReferences.howUsedInTdd: Drives task 3 (gt_graphicrequest schema + uniqueness on gt_graphiccontrolnumber), task 6 (AutonumberFlow format string), task 10 (Landing screen showing the read-only field), task 15 (New Item display) and task 16 (Edit Item validation regex on Source File Control Number).

openQuestions.question: Which Accenture-owned SharePoint site collection should host the per-deal completed-graphic libraries referenced by gt_SharePointGuideUrl, and who owns governance of that site collection? PDD provides two example URLs but no canonical production location.

Confirm the precise Accenture brand colour values (the PDD says 'Accenture colour. Shared sample colour with the developer' but the swatch is not in the document). Needed for canvas theme tokens in task 9 and ongoing UI tasks 10–16.

For the Teams Member-Access dropdown on scr_NewItem.peopleDesigner — should the people picker be filtered to channel members only, Team members, or any internal Accenture user? SDD says 'restricted to channel members'; clarify whether 'channel members' equals private-channel membership or parent Team membership when the channel is Standard.
